title: execution-manifest
description: The Slicr's output contract: a plan embeds one fenced JSON block {"execution-manifest": [entry, ...]}. The reference producer/validator is plan_to_nodes.py; an executor consumes the local:true entries as RED-gated nodes.

id.description: Node id; becomes the NN-<id>.json filename.

files.description: Editable files the node may change (relative paths).

change.description: The task description shown to the executing model.

accept.description: Shell command; exit 0 iff the node is solved (the RED oracle).

kind.description: edit an existing region, or create a new single file.

forbid.description: Constraints the change must not violate.

local.description: Offload to an executor as a node. Only local:true entries become nodes; local:false is executed inline by the planning model.
